free_text: Production of residual nuclei by 3He-induced reactions

commercial origin. The aluminum foils of thickness
varying from 12.4 to 52.0 mg/cm2 and copper foils

In order to check a possible neutron and gamma
background activation several Al and Cu foils were
exposed at a location shielded against the primary
Up to six measurements of the gamma-ray
spectra were made for each foil at different times
after irradiation - from 6 hours to 100 days for Al
and from 10 to 250 days for Cu.
